<!-- noesis:modules:start -->
<!-- Assembled by assemble.py — re-run it to update; edit outside this region. -->

### Archive
- Completed work moves to archive/ (never delete, just archive).

### Inbox & Capture
- New files from outside land in inbox/ first; sort later (cadence: every Friday).
- When something lands in inbox/, offer to sort it before it goes stale.

### Daily Notes
- Daily notes live at daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Start the day by reading today's note.
- Surface top 3 priorities at the top of each daily note.
- Check inbox/ for unprocessed files when the day starts.

### People
- Person notes live in people/ (contact info and last conversation). When a new person comes up, offer to add them to people/People.md.

### Projects
- Active projects live in projects/<name>/. Read the project folder before starting work on it.

### Research & Notes
- Notes, synthesis, and saved ideas go in research/. When writing, read recent notes first to calibrate voice and context.
<!-- noesis:modules:end -->
